Summarise a herald_result

Source: R/val-result.R
summary.herald_result.Rd

Summarise a herald_result

Usage

# S3 method for class 'herald_result'
summary(object, ...)

Arguments

object

A herald_result object.

...

Ignored.

Value

A named list with state, rules_applied, rules_total, datasets_checked, n_findings_fired, n_findings_advisory, severity_counts, duration, and timestamp.

See also

Other methods: herald_submission-methods, print.herald_define(), print.herald_dict_provider(), print.herald_result(), print.herald_spec()
